Class PagingControls

java.lang.Object
javafx.scene.Node
javafx.scene.Parent
javafx.scene.layout.Region
javafx.scene.control.Control
com.dlsc.gemsfx.paging.PagingControlBase
com.dlsc.gemsfx.paging.PagingControls
All Implemented Interfaces:
javafx.css.Styleable, javafx.event.EventTarget, javafx.scene.control.Skinnable
public class PagingControls extends PagingControlBase
A control for navigating paged information, for example, a paged database table view.

    Methods inherited from interface javafx.css.Styleable

    getStyleableNode

  • Property Details

    • needed

      public final javafx.beans.property.ReadOnlyBooleanProperty neededProperty
      This property can be used to determine if the paging controls should be shown in the UI or not. The controls are only needed if the user needs to be able to navigate to different pages. This might not be the case if the view only shows a limited number of items AND the "page size" selector does not contain any values that would create more than one page to show.
      See Also:
      • isNeeded()
      • neededProperty()

  • Constructor Details

    • PagingControls

      public PagingControls()
      Constructs a new instance.

    • isNeeded

      public final boolean isNeeded()
      Gets the value of the needed property.
      Property description:
      This property can be used to determine if the paging controls should be shown in the UI or not. The controls are only needed if the user needs to be able to navigate to different pages. This might not be the case if the view only shows a limited number of items AND the "page size" selector does not contain any values that would create more than one page to show.
      Returns:
      the value of the needed property
      See Also:
      • neededProperty()

    • neededProperty

      public final javafx.beans.property.ReadOnlyBooleanProperty neededProperty()
      This property can be used to determine if the paging controls should be shown in the UI or not. The controls are only needed if the user needs to be able to navigate to different pages. This might not be the case if the view only shows a limited number of items AND the "page size" selector does not contain any values that would create more than one page to show.
      Returns:
      true if the controls should be shown to the user
      See Also:
      • isNeeded()
